title: La mandragola
writer: Niccolò Machiavelli, Luigi Magni, Stefano Strucchi
actors: Rosanna Schiaffino, Philippe Leroy, Romolo Valli
plot: Adaptation of the comic play by Macchiavelli about a man's attempt to bed a woman unable to have a child by pretending to be a doctor.
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 1 win & 4 nominations total
